purpose: Machine-readable source-family snapshot for Mansu reference curation. This file is evidence for freshness checks, not a substitute for reading source skill files.

families.evidence: ouroboros --version; ouroboros --help; ouroboros init --help; find /Users/hansol/.codex/skills -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'ouroboros-*'
families.install_evidence: uv tool install 'ouroboros-ai[all]' installed ouroboros-ai 0.40.1 and executable /Users/hansol/.local/bin/ouroboros; ouroboros setup --runtime codex configured Codex, installed 20 Ouroboros Codex skills, registered MCP, and wrote /Users/hansol/.codex/rules/ouroboros.md.

families.evidence: cat /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack/VERSION; git -C /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack rev-parse --short HEAD; find /Users/hansol/.gstack/repos/gstack/.agents/skills -maxdepth 1 -type d -name 'gstack-*'

families.priority_rule: For Codex runtimes, prefer LazyCodex / OMO Codex plugin as the highest-priority Oh My execution transport when codex plugin list reports omo@sisyphuslabs installed/enabled and hook/MCP entrypoints are healthy. Fall back to omx, then native Codex with Mansu slice discipline.
families.source_family_split: LazyCodex / OMO drives Codex execution. Mansu owns routing, evidence, checkpoints, and final ship/hold judgment. Ouroboros shapes early goals, Seed, Ledger, and long-horizon direction. gstack provides independent validation and specialist gates. Open Design creates design artifacts, and VoltAgent/awesome-design-md provides DESIGN.md reference grammar.
families.evidence: git -C /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/local/lazycodex rev-parse --short HEAD; git -C /tmp/lazycodex-latest submodule status --recursive; /Applications/Codex.app/Contents/Resources/codex plugin list; python3 -m json.tool /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/cache/sisyphuslabs/omo/0.1.0/hooks/hooks.json; node /Users/hansol/.codex/plugins/cache/sisyphuslabs/omo/0.1.0/components/lsp/dist/cli.js --help
families.install_update_warning: The local source checkout may be dirty and the installed cache contains node_modules. Do not use naive recursive copy/diff/update tooling. Preserve the marketplace name sisyphuslabs and the local config marketplace key indirection. Telemetry hooks may be disabled locally and should not be assumed active.

families.role: Core OmO harness source behind LazyCodex: discipline agents, parallel orchestration, model routing, skills, hooks, and lifecycle concepts. Treat LazyCodex as the Codex-facing thin distribution, not the full upstream truth.

families.source_path: runtime aggregated skill directory, not upstream source of truth
families.inventory_warning: Do not use aggregated runtime skills as upstream Oh My inventory. Exclude mansu-*, gstack-*, project-local skills, and unrelated curated skills before recording Oh My source drift.
families.source_discovery_rule: Prefer the adapter package/repo source or adapter-owned skill roots. Use omx --skills or ~/.codex/skills only as installed-runtime evidence with exclusions.
